title: Aura Diamond Solitaire Ring
description: An elegant manifestation of pure light. This signature solitaire ring features a hand-selected round brilliant diamond mounted on a tapering band of solid metal, finished with delicate double claws that elevate the stone's brilliance.
gemstones: 1.25 Carat Round Brilliant Diamond (F Color, VVS2 Clarity, GIA Certified)

title: Lustre South Sea Pearl Drop Necklace
description: An exquisite South Sea pearl of flawless lustre, suspended from a delicate chain highlighted by a single pear-cut diamond. Perfect balance between classical opulence and contemporary minimalism.
alloys: 14k / 18k Yellow Gold, White Gold, Rose Gold, Platinum (PT950)
gemstones: 11mm South Sea Cultured Pearl with 0.15 Carat Pear Diamond Accent

title: Celestial Diamond Cascade Earrings
description: Inspired by stardust, these long cascade earrings flow gracefully with every movement. Features bezel-set brilliant round and marquise diamonds that catch the light from all angles.
alloys: 14k / 18k Yellow Gold, White Gold, Rose Gold, Platinum (PT950)
gemstones: Total 2.45 Carats Mixed Round & Marquise Cut Diamonds (E-F Color, VS1 Clarity)

title: Eternity Diamond Tennis Bracelet
description: A continuous circle of exceptional brilliance. This classic tennis bracelet showcases individually hand-set ideal cut diamonds, held in a refined four-prong micro-setting that maximizes flexibility and shine.
alloys: 14k / 18k Yellow Gold, White Gold, Rose Gold, Platinum (PT950)
gemstones: Total 4.50 Carats Round Brilliant Cut Diamonds (F Color, VVS2-VS1 Clarity)

title: Halo Cushion Cut Diamond Ring
description: A striking cushion-cut diamond surrounded by a brilliant halo of pavé-set diamonds on a delicate band. A romantic design that accentuates the soft curves and deep fire of the center stone.
alloys: 14k / 18k Yellow Gold, White Gold, Rose Gold, Platinum (PT950)
gemstones: 1.50 Carat Cushion Cut Center Diamond with 0.35 Carat Pavé Border

title: Modernist Gold Link Choker
description: A bold contemporary piece featuring flat-profile interlinked geometric gold components. Exudes understated luxury and fits perfectly along the neckline for a smooth, high-fashion statement.
alloys: 14k / 18k Yellow Gold, White Gold, Rose Gold, Platinum (PT950)
